text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, while I'm out shopping...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you. Come with me if you've got nothing
better to do. I'll give you whatever data set you
want in return.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
There're some goods I want from that store.
Limited-edition shoes, to be precise. The studded
U-MAX226.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
It makes no sense to me that shop-exclusive
products still exist in this day and age, but them's
the breaks for me, I guess.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
There's a reward in it if you line up for me. You
in?
choice_data_list: Why don't you line up yourself?
Why don't you line up yourself?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
There's no logic in standing around in a line. I got
mad as hell earlier when I tried to do it.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Dammit, why don't they just sell them online to
begin with? Then I wouldn't have to waste time
doing this.
choice_data_list: Why don't you get them in a way that suits you?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Well, if we're talking about a method that suits
me, I had one from the start, but I decided to nix
it right away.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Then again, I already got approval from the
academy, so it'd be rude if I didn't go ahead with
it, right?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Guess it's time to stop holding back and do things my way!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Whatever Air Shakur's suggesting sounds kind of unsavory, but maybe I could learn a thing or two from her way of doing things.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, can't say I didn't expect that line of logic to
pop up. You believe in hard work? I don't.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
But I can tell that you don't wanna do it, even
though the opportunity to get data from me is so
rare.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Tch, fine. I'll use the time to gather intel on other
stores while I'm in line.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She ends up queuing up herself, tutting and
grumbling the whole time it takes to reach the
store. I hope the U-MAX226 shoes were worth
it...
